search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:apirequestsoverview" $orgid$ | spath path=responseCodeCounts | eval responseCodeCounts=split(responseCodeCounts, ",") | mvexpand responseCodeCounts | eval responseCodeCounts=replace(responseCodeCounts, "}", "") | eval key_value_pair=split(responseCodeCounts, ":") | eval value=mvindex(key_value_pair, 1) | stats sum(value) as "Total API Calls"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:apirequestsoverview" $orgid$ | spath path=responseCodeCounts | eval responseCodeCounts=split(responseCodeCounts, ",") | mvexpand responseCodeCounts | eval responseCodeCounts=replace(responseCodeCounts, "[{}\"]", " ") | eval key_value_pair=split(responseCodeCounts, ":") | eval Key=mvindex(key_value_pair, 0) | eval Value=mvindex(key_value_pair, 1) | stats sum(Value) as Value by Key | sort - 0 Value&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$

search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:apirequestsoverview" $orgid$ | spath path=responseCodeCounts | eval responseCodeCounts=split(responseCodeCounts, ",") | mvexpand responseCodeCounts | eval responseCodeCounts=replace(responseCodeCounts, "[{}\"]", "") | eval key_value_pair=split(responseCodeCounts, ":") | eval Key=mvindex(key_value_pair, 0) | eval value=mvindex(key_value_pair, 1) | stats sum(value) as "Count" by Key | where Count!=0
